data.content:
RIT
RIT is a commonly used acronym for Rochester Institute of Technology, the college referred to by the speaker.

Rochester Institute Of Technology
Rochester Institute of Technology is an educational institution referred to in the context of being attended by the speaker.

Pull
Pull refers to exercises targeting muscle groups involved in pulling movements, like the back and biceps.

Legs
Legs refer to exercises focusing on the lower body muscles, including the quadriceps, hamstrings, and calves.

Gym
The Gym is a place or concept related to physical exercise and fitness routines.

Split
Split is a workout method that involves dividing exercises into different sessions based on muscle groups, such as push, pull, and legs.

Push
Push refers to exercises targeting muscle groups responsible for pushing movements, such as the chest, shoulders, and triceps.

Chase Balmer
Chase Balmer is the individual conducting the wine-tasting journal exercise and responsible for writing the tasting notes.

Santa Margarita Ranch
Santa Margarita Ranch is the specific vineyard location in Paso Robles where Ancient Peaks Cabernet Sauvignon is produced.

data.entity_name: Bully Hill Vineyards Chardonnay Riesling Fusion
data.content:
Bully Hill Vineyards Chardonnay Riesling Fusion
Bully Hill Vineyards Chardonnay Riesling Fusion is a non-vintage white wine from the Finger Lakes, composed of 60% Chardonnay and 40% Riesling, with an alcohol content of 11.5%.

Paso Robles
Paso Robles is the wine region in California where Ancient Peaks Cabernet Sauvignon originates.

Parmesan
Parmesan is a type of cheese used as a pairing with the Ancient Peaks Cabernet Sauvignon, which enhanced the tasting experience.

Ancient Peaks Cabernet Sauvignon
Ancient Peaks Cabernet Sauvignon is a 2021 wine from Paso Robles, California, made in Santa Margarita Ranch with an alcohol content of 14.3%.

Finger Lakes
Finger Lakes is the region associated with producing the Bully Hill Vineyards Chardonnay Riesling Fusion white wine.

Prosciutto
Prosciutto is a type of Italian dry-cured ham used as a pairing with the Ancient Peaks Cabernet Sauvignon.

MyCourses Assignment
MyCourses Assignment is the platform to which the tasting journal and notes are submitted as part of Chase Balmer's exercise requirement.
